mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points causes immediate equity sell-offs over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in the index of industrial production during periods of high inflation compresses corporate margins and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during high inflation periods yield positive 20-day returns in >55% of observations, or the mechanism shows no predictive power when CPIAUCSL > 3.0% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate level above 4.0% reduces liquidity-driven equity volatility and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of instances when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%, or the threshold effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between declining total nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment rates forecasts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence fails to predict negative 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product supports corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth coincides with negative 20-day returns in >55% of quarters, or the signal's Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in industrial production and retail sales during periods of rapid monetary tightening triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Concurrent declines in INDPRO and RSAFS during tightening cycles produce positive 5-day returns in >60% of observations, or the joint signal loses predictive accuracy in out-of-sample tests.
